name: Global Atomic Corporation
content: Global Atomic is a unique energy and minerals company developing the high-grade Dasa uranium deposit in Niger. Dasa is the largest high-grade uranium discovery in Africa in decades and is being fast-tracked toward production. Additionally, Global Atomic generates steady cash flow from its 49% interest in a modern zinc recycling joint venture in Turkey. This dual-asset model provides a unique combination of growth and stability within the nuclear and industrial mineral sectors.
